settings.title: Uplink Launches a Round-the-Clock Helpdesk
settings.excerpt: Support no longer stops at five, so a server problem at midnight gets a real person, not a voicemail.
settings.body:
Technology does not keep office hours, and neither should support for it. From this month, the Uplink helpdesk is staffed twenty-four hours a day, every day of the year.

That means an overnight outage or a weekend lockout reaches an engineer straight away rather than an answering service. Critical issues are now picked up within fifteen minutes, whatever the hour.

The change is included for all managed service clients at no extra cost. For businesses that run shifts or serve customers after dark, it removes a worry that should never have been theirs to carry.
